'''Jenatahza''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Bounty Hunter" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'' is set immediately after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> he was wanted by the [[Malastare Special Service]] for being part of a plot to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Junior Representative/Legends|Representative]] [[Ainlee Teem/Legends|Ainlee Teem]]. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-[[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].<ref name="Bounty Hunter" />
